name: gorgon-scout
description: Run Gorgon Scout web-application penetration-test scans from Claude.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to a locally installed copy of Gorgon Scout, a Windows web-application penetration-testing tool. Ask Claude in plain language to scan a web app or API you are authorised to test; it manages target profiles, runs the scan, streams progress and findings, and produces a Word report with optional AI analysis. Requires Gorgon Scout to be installed (download from https://gorgoncyber.com/scout-download.html). Every scan still requires you to confirm the in-scope hostname, and your account credentials are never sent to Claude.

tools.name: scout_account_status
tools.description: Show signed-in user, plan, AI token balance, and entitlements.

tools.name: scout_signin
tools.description: Ensure the user is signed in to Gorgon Scout.

tools.name: scout_list_profiles
tools.description: List saved scan profiles.

tools.name: scout_show_profile
tools.description: Show a profile's hosts, endpoints, and auth state.

tools.name: scout_create_profile
tools.description: Create an empty scan profile.

tools.name: scout_delete_profile
tools.description: Delete a scan profile.

tools.name: scout_rename_profile
tools.description: Rename a scan profile.

tools.name: scout_import_har
tools.description: Append HAR entries onto a profile's recording.

tools.name: scout_import_spec
tools.description: Attach an OpenAPI/Postman/HAR schema to a profile (API workflow).

tools.name: scout_set_auth_headers
tools.description: Set static auth headers for the API workflow.

tools.name: scout_clear_auth_headers
tools.description: Clear a profile's static auth headers.

tools.name: scout_set_server_override
tools.description: Override the spec's server URL for a profile.

tools.name: scout_clear_server_override
tools.description: Remove a profile's server URL override.

tools.name: scout_record_target
tools.description: AI-driven Chromium auto-record of a target URL: crawl discovery plus interactive auth collection into a profile (webapp default).

tools.name: scout_answer_auth_classify
tools.description: Answer a classify-auth-fields event: mark each captured login field reusable or one-time.

tools.name: scout_answer_auth_prompt
tools.description: Answer an auth-prompt event: HTTP Basic credentials, magic link, or external-action-complete.

tools.name: scout_cancel_auth_prompt
tools.description: Abort a single pending auth step by creating its cancel file.

tools.name: scout_start_scan
tools.description: Start a penetration-test scan (returns a scanId for polling).

tools.name: scout_scan_status
tools.description: Poll a running scan/analysis for new progress and findings.

tools.name: scout_cancel_scan
tools.description: Cancel a running scan or analysis.

tools.name: scout_start_analysis
tools.description: Start AI post-scan analysis on a profile's latest report.

tools.name: scout_shutdown_app
tools.description: Cleanly shut down any running elevated Scout app process.
